title: syntherisma stricta
side_effects: Syntherisma stricta can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, respiratory problems, and gastrointestinal issues in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can also lead to kidney damage, liver failure, and cardiovascular issues in extreme cases. Additionally, improper use of the plant may cause headaches, dizziness, and nausea due to its potent chemical properties. In rare instances, excessive consumption of syntherisma stricta can result in hallucinations, tremors, and even coma in vulnerable individuals.
